title: Chef and Queries on a Tree

content.problemStatement:
Chef has a tree with NNN nodes numbered 111 through NNN. Each node of the tree has a weight; let's denote the weight of node vvv by ava_vavтАЛ.

Chef should answer QQQ queries. Each query is described by an integer rrr and a list of kkk nodes u1,u2,тАж,uku_1, u_2, \dots, u_ku1тАЛ,u2тАЛ,тАж,ukтАЛ. In each query, let SSS be the connected subgraph of the tree (i.e. a subtree) which contains the nodes u1,u2,тАж,uku_1, u_2, \dots, u_ku1тАЛ,u2тАЛ,тАж,ukтАЛ and has the minimum possible size (it can be proven that these conditions uniquely define SSS). The answer to a query is minuтИИS(тИгauтИТrтИг)\mathrm{min}_{u \in S}(|a_u - r|)minuтИИSтАЛ(тИгauтАЛтИТrтИг).

Help Chef and answer all the queries. Note the special format of the input, which is intended to ensure you can only know each query (except the first) after answering the previous query.
constraints: the graph described on the input is a tree
in each query, u1,u2,тАж,uku_1, u_2, \dots, u_ku1тАЛ,u2тАЛ,тАж,ukтАЛ are pairwise distinct
the sum of kkk for each test case does not exceed 3тЛЕ1053 \cdot 10^53тЛЕ105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers a1,a2,тАж,aNa_1, a_2, \dots, a_Na1тАЛ,a2тАЛ,тАж,aNтАЛ.
Each of the following NтИТ1N-1NтИТ1 lines contains two space-separated integers xxx and yyy denoting an edge between nodes xxx and yyy.
The following QQQ lines describe queries. Each of these lines contains two space-separated integers rтА▓r'rтА▓ and kkk, followed by a space and kkk space-separated integers u1тА▓,u2тА▓,тАж,ukтА▓u_1', u_2', \dots, u_k'u1тА▓тАЛ,u2тА▓тАЛ,тАж,ukтА▓тАЛ. Let's denote the answer to the previous query by ansansans (ans=0ans=0ans=0 if this is the first query). The values of rrr and u1,u2,тАж,uku_1, u_2, \dots, u_ku1тАЛ,u2тАЛ,тАж,ukтАЛ for this query can be computed as follows:

r=rтА▓тКХansr = r' \oplus ansr=rтА▓тКХans
ui=uiтА▓тКХansu_i = u_i' \oplus ansuiтАЛ=uiтА▓тАЛтКХans for each valid iii
content.outputFormat: For each query, print a single line containing one integer тАФ the answer to this query.
